evidence: standards/enterprise/accessibility-global-readiness.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: No View-local product-formatting exception is permitted; a Presenter-equivalent mapper remains separately testable even when platform formatters provide the implementation.
statement: A Presenter or equivalent locale-aware presentation mapper formats raw dates, numbers, currency, measurements, names, lists, and errors into display-ready values; UIKit and SwiftUI Views only render those values and apply platform accessibility mechanics.
